do_not_hit.what_to_do: Wait it out, apply conditions instead, or disengage

do_not_hit.what_happens: Blocks all attacks, then hits back with daze + damage
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Do NOT attack during stance. Wait 2s or bait with weak hit
Wait it out, don't attack into the block

do_not_hit.what_happens: Blocks all attacks in front for 3s (Virtue of Courage active)
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Flank or wait, do not hit from the front
Use melee attacks only, walk inside the dome

do_not_hit.what_happens: Invulnerable to conditions and strikes for 4s (channeled)
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Wait it out or CC to interrupt the channel

do_not_hit.what_happens: Evade all attacks while dealing damage (sword 2)
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Dodge away from the damage, wait for it to end

do_not_hit.what_happens: Converts incoming damage to healing for 3s
do_not_hit.what_to_do: STOP ALL DAMAGE. You are healing them. Disengage immediately
Reduce pressure, focus someone not affected, or wait

do_not_hit.what_happens: Reaper Shroud skill 3 grants temporary invuln on charge
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Avoid hitting during the charge-up animation

do_not_hit.what_happens: Heals for a % of all damage dealt for 6s
do_not_hit.what_to_do: Disengage — your damage heals them. Wait 6s.

do_not_hit.what_happens: Charging massive hit. Gains stability + damage reduction while charging
do_not_hit.what_to_do: CC to interrupt, or dodge the release. Don't face-tank
